paths.name: @repo/types
paths.message: Wizard code must classify in `TourFormProfile`/`TourDomainProfile` only. Use `getProfileRules` / `getStepRule` / `getFieldRule` from `@/features/tours/wizard/profileRules/getProfileRules`. See `docs/20-architecture/tour-profile-guardrails.md`.

paths.name: @/features/tours/config/tripDetailsFieldConfig
paths.message: Edit-side EventKind matrix — forbidden in wizard code. Add field rules to `apps/web/src/features/tours/wizard/profileRules/rules.ts`.

paths.name: @repo/types
paths.message: Edit page tree must classify via `TourFormProfile` / `TourDomainProfile`. Legacy `EventKind` reads belong inside the adapter (`apps/web/src/features/tours/domain/tourDomainProfileAdapters.ts`), Edit form root (`apps/web/src/components/tours/TourForm.tsx`), legacy Edit matrix (`apps/web/src/features/tours/config/tripDetailsFieldConfig*.ts` — slated for retirement in Phase P6), or telemetry (`apps/web/src/features/tours/observability/*`). See `docs/20-architecture/tour-profile-guardrails.md` and `promptq.md`.

paths.name: @repo/types
paths.message: Phase P8: legacy `EventKind` axis is namespaced. Import as `import { Legacy } from "@repo/types"` and read `Legacy.EventKind` / `Legacy.resolveEventKindFromTourContext` / `Legacy.eventKindForDomainProfile`. The top-level deprecated re-exports will be removed next cycle. See `docs/20-architecture/tour-profile-guardrails.md` and `promptq.md` (Phase P8).
